# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.

Write secure code.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
  portLevelMtls:
    8080:
      mode: DISABLE
    9090:
      mode: DISABLE
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: secure-services
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      security.istio.io/tlsMode: istio
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-plaintext
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: "*"
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["*"]
        paths: ["/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["*"]
        paths: ["/healthz", "/readyz"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/metrics"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/version"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/status"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/config"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/debug"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/admin"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/v1/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/v2/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/v3/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v2/*"]
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: []
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v3/*"]

    - source:
        principals: []
    to:

        paths: ["/internal/*"]
